name: Basin & vanity fit
reasoning: Fit basin + vanity unit, plumb taps/waste, seal, leak-test. A competent solo plumber/fitter does this in ~2-2.5h. 180 is slightly long; 150 is honest. Trim modest.

name: Shower wall panelling
reasoning: Waterproof PVC/acrylic shower panels over 2-3 walls: measure, cut, bond, trim, seal. Genuinely a 4.5-5.5h job. Audit's 49 is absurd. 300 honest for a standard enclosure; lean long. Depends on wall count/substrate.

name: Bathroom suite install
reasoning: Full suite strip-out + fit (bath/shower, WC, basin, connect). Small=half day, Medium=full day, Large=2 days. These are already realistic multi-day figures; the audit flagging it at 49 min is the benchmark failing on a whole-job SKU. LEAVE as-is unless owner's crew is faster. No change.

name: Shower screen or enclosure fit
reasoning: Fit screen/enclosure: level, fix, seal. Bath screen ~1h, walk-in enclosure ~2h. 120 slightly long for the common case; 105 honest. Modest trim.

name: Fit a timber beam or mantel
reasoning: Fix decorative timber beam/mantel over fireplace, level + solid fixings into masonry. ~2h. 150 a touch long; 120 honest.

name: Box in pipes or boiler
reasoning: Build timber/MDF boxing around pipework or boiler, ready to paint. Standard run ~2h. 180 inflated; 120 honest for a typical boxing job.

name: Bath panel fit
reasoning: Cut, fit and seal a single bath panel. This is a ~45-60 min job. 120 is double; 60 honest.

name: General carpentry repair
reasoning: Bespoke catch-all. Hard to pin without scope. 180 likely padded for the typical small joinery repair; 120 a fairer default. Owner may want to keep wider for variability.

name: Replace ceiling tiles
reasoning: Swap suspended/drop ceiling tiles. After setup (access/ladder), each tile is a couple of minutes once the grid is open; 25/tile is heavily padded. 12/tile generous. Setup 20.

name: Decking install or repair
reasoning: Install or repair garden decking. A new deck is easily a full day+; a repair is far less. Single fixed SKU spans both. 300 (5h) is a reasonable midpoint and the audit's 28 min is nonsense. LEAVE; owner to split install vs repair if they want tighter.

name: Wooden gate repair
reasoning: Repair dropped/sticking wooden gate (re-hang, brace, adjust latch). ~1-1.5h. 120 slightly long; 90 honest.

name: Fit a handrail
reasoning: Fit staircase/wall handrail on brackets, fixed into studs/masonry. ~1-1.5h. 120 a touch long; 90 honest.

name: Wall panelling install
reasoning: Decorative panelling/beading, ready to paint. Small feature wall ~3h, medium ~5h, large ~full day. Current tiers slightly long; trimmed ~25%. Audit's 28 min is absurd for any panelling. Owner to confirm against their finish standard.

name: Kitchen plinth fit
reasoning: Cut and clip kitchen plinths along a run. A standard kitchen's plinths take ~1-1.5h total, not 90 min PER run + setup. 45/run + 20 setup is honest. Per-unit was badly padded.

name: Sash window repair
reasoning: Sash repair (cords, beads, balance). A cord renewal is ~2h; fuller overhaul more. 210 long for the common cord/bead job; 150 honest. Owner to confirm typical scope.

name: Skirting board fitting
reasoning: Measure/cut/fit skirting, ready to caulk. Per prototype: ~20 setup + 8/m. Small (1 wall) ~1h is fine; medium/large tiers slightly long. 60/120/240 honest by run length.

name: Fit a vanity top
reasoning: Cut and fit a timber vanity/worktop over a unit, seal. ~1-1.25h. 90 marginally long; 75 honest. Small trim.

name: Fit window boards
reasoning: Fit internal window board(s)/sills. One board ~1h; several rooms' worth more. 180 reads as multi-board padded; 90 honest for the common single/double. Owner to confirm typical count.

name: Fit a blind
reasoning: Bracket + hang + level a blind. Prototype = ~10 setup + 30/blind. 50/blind is padded; first blind ~30-40 min, subsequent quicker. 25/unit + 15 setup honest.

name: Fit blinds in a bay
reasoning: Bay blinds (min 3), each levelled/aligned. Slightly fiddlier than a single blind so 30/unit (vs 25 standard) + 20 setup. 55/unit was padded.

name: Fit a curtain pole or rail
reasoning: Mark, level, fix a pole/rail to take weight. Prototype ~15 setup + 30/pole. 55/window padded; 30/unit + 15 setup honest.

name: Re-fix a fallen curtain rail
reasoning: Re-fix pulled-away rail with proper fixings, fill holes. ~45 min is honest. No change.

name: Fit a bendable curtain track
reasoning: Flexible PVC track for a bay/curved window: measure, bend, fix, clip. ~1-1.25h. 120 long; 75 honest.

name: Ease a sticking door
reasoning: Plane/adjust a sticking or dropped door. Prototype adjust_door ~35 min; with re-hang/hinge work ~1h. 75 a touch long; 60 honest.

name: External door fitting
reasoning: Hang external door, weather-seal, furniture, test latch. Genuinely ~3h for one done properly (not the audit's 62 min). 180/door slightly long; 150 + 30 setup honest. Owner to confirm against frame condition.

name: Door frame repair
reasoning: Repair/rebuild damaged frame + rehang door. ~2.5-3h depending on damage. 180 reasonable but slightly long for a partial repair; 150 honest. Owner to weigh typical severity.

name: Cupboard door hinge fix
reasoning: Realign/replace cupboard/wardrobe hinges. A concealed hinge swap/adjust is ~15-20 min each. 40/door padded; 20/unit + 15 setup honest.

name: Door handle or latch swap
reasoning: Replace handle/latch/hinge. Prototype fit_handle ~30 min. 50/door slightly long; 30/unit + 15 setup honest.

name: Internal door hanging
reasoning: Hang internal door: plane to fit, hinges, latch, handles. Prototype hang_door ~90 min + 15 setup, '2h if new latch+handle'. 100/door is fine-to-slightly-long; 90 + 15 honest.

name: Fit fire door seals
reasoning: Rout/fit intumescent smoke seals + closer to a fire door. ~30-40 min each. 45/door slightly long; 30/unit + 15 setup honest.

name: Garage door repair
reasoning: Realign/repair up-and-over or roller mechanism/frame. ~1.5h typical. 120 a touch long; 90 honest. Owner to confirm — spring/track jobs vary.

name: Fit a letterbox
reasoning: Cut and fit a letterbox into a door. Prototype fit_letterbox ~45 min. 75 long; 45 honest.

name: Downlight or spotlight swap
reasoning: Swap failed downlights/spots (min 2) on existing wiring. ~10-15 min each once isolated. 20/unit slightly long; 15/unit + 20 setup honest.

name: Electrical fault find
reasoning: Diagnose a dead circuit/light/socket and advise. ~1h is honest diagnostic time. No change.

name: Extractor fan fit
reasoning: Replace bathroom/kitchen extractor on existing point, check venting. Prototype fix_extractor ~65 min + diagnostic risk. 90 slightly long; 75 honest.

name: Fan pull-cord swap
reasoning: Replace a pull-cord switch. ~30-35 min. Honest. No change (audit ratio 0.68 — already fine).

name: Outdoor floodlight fit
reasoning: Fit floodlight/PIR from a suitable supply, test. ~1-1.25h if supply exists. 90 marginally long; 75 honest.

name: Light fitting swap
reasoning: Swap a ceiling/wall light on existing wiring. Prototype change_light ~40 min total. 75/light is heavily padded; 30/unit + 15 setup honest. High-impact common task.

name: Pendant light swap
reasoning: Swap a pendant/hanging light, level, test. ~25-30 min on existing rose. 50/unit padded; 25/unit + 15 setup honest.

name: Add a new socket
reasoning: Add a socket spurred from existing supply, chase/run, make good, test. Prototype fit_socket ~50 min but a NEW point with a cable run is more (chasing). 90/socket long for a simple spur; 60 + 20 setup honest. Owner to confirm whether chasing/making-good is included.

name: Socket swap
reasoning: Replace a worn socket on existing back box, test. ~20-25 min each. 45/unit slightly long; 25/unit + 15 setup honest.

name: Smoke or CO alarm fit
reasoning: Fit and test smoke/CO alarms. Battery units ~15 min; mains-interlinked more. 40/unit long for the common case; 25/unit + 15 setup honest.

name: Fused spur fit or repair
reasoning: Fit/repair a fused spur, test. ~1h is honest. No change.

name: Light switch swap
reasoning: Swap a switch/dimmer on existing box, test. ~15-20 min each. 35/unit slightly long; 20/unit + 15 setup honest.

name: Fence panel install or repair
reasoning: Replace fence panels into existing posts. A like-for-like panel swap is ~30-45 min each; if posts need work it climbs. 90/panel padded for the common swap; 45/panel + 30 setup honest. Owner to confirm whether post replacement is bundled.

name: Replace a fence post
reasoning: Dig out rotten post, reset in concrete. Genuinely ~1.5h per post (dig, mix, set, hold) — more than a panel. 90/post slightly long but defensible; 75 + 30 honest. Concrete cure aside, lean long. Owner call.

name: Fit trellis or screening
reasoning: Fix trellis/screening to existing fence/posts, level. ~1-1.25h. 120 long; 75 honest.

name: Bed assembly
reasoning: Assemble a bed frame; ottoman/storage adds time. ~1.5h common, ottoman ~2h. 120 fair-but-long for a standard frame; 90 honest. Lean slightly long for storage beds.

name: Desk or table assembly
reasoning: Assemble desk/table/chair. Prototype flatpack ~60-70 min/item. 90 slightly long; 60 honest.

name: Drawers or cabinet assembly
reasoning: Build a chest of drawers/sideboard. ~1-1.5h. 120 slightly long; 75 honest for the common drawer unit.

name: Flat-pack assembly
reasoning: Generic flat-pack catch-all. Prototype ~60-70 min/item. 120 padded for an average item; 75 honest. Owner may keep wider since 'flat-pack' covers a huge range.

name: Sofa or large furniture build
reasoning: Assemble sofa/corner unit/large furniture. Bulkier so ~1.5-2h. 120 fair; 105 honest. Minor trim only — these are genuinely bigger than a desk.

name: Wardrobe assembly
reasoning: Flat-pack wardrobe: assemble, level, align doors. Prototype notes 'wardrobe ~2-3x an item' = ~2-2.5h. 180 slightly long; 150 honest. Lean long for sliding-door units.

name: Fit carpet
reasoning: Gripper, underlay, stretch and trim a carpet. One average room ~3-4h; whole-house far more. 300 reads for a large room/multi; 240 honest for a standard room. Audit's 48 is nonsense. Owner to confirm typical area.

name: Lay laminate or LVT flooring
reasoning: Lay laminate/LVT: underlay, boards, trim, beading. Small room ~half day, medium ~6h, large ~full day. These tiers are realistic; the audit's 48 min (per-m² confusion) is wrong. LEAVE as-is; owner to confirm room sizes behind Small/Medium/Large.

name: Lift & remove old flooring
reasoning: Lift old flooring, dispose, prep subfloor. Tiles/glued ~hard; carpet ~quick. 240 long for the average room; 180 honest. Audit's 48 nonsense. Owner to confirm typical floor type (screwed-down boards/tile adhesive push it up).

name: Lay engineered or solid wood
reasoning: Lay engineered/solid wood incl. herringbone — a genuinely premium, slow, multi-hour-to-full-day job (herringbone especially). 600 (10h ~ 1.25 days) is realistic, NOT the audit's 48 min. LEAVE. Owner to confirm whether 600 represents one large room or splits across days.

name: Furniture repair
reasoning: Repair wobbly/broken furniture (runners, hinges, joints). ~1-1.25h typical. 90 slightly long; 75 honest.

name: Dismantle & move furniture
reasoning: Dismantle, move, rebuild bulky furniture within a home. ~1.5h common. 120 fair-but-long; 90 honest. Owner to confirm — multi-item moves vary widely.

name: Garden tidy & weed
reasoning: Weed, prune, cut back, clear green waste. Time-sold by definition. Small ~2h, medium ~half day, large ~full day are reasonable. Trim Small to 120; keep Medium/Large. Owner to confirm sizing as this is genuinely variable labour.

name: Trim a hedge
reasoning: Cut/shape a hedge + clear clippings. Prototype hedge ~15/m. A typical domestic hedge ~1.5h incl. clearing; large boundary hedges far more. 120 fair for a big one but long for the median; 90 honest. Owner to confirm typical hedge size.

name: Mow & edge the lawn
reasoning: Mow + edge a domestic lawn. ~45-60 min typical. 90 long; 60 honest.

name: Lay a shed or garden base
reasoning: Lay a level slab/concrete base. Excavate, level, hardcore, slabs or pour — genuinely a ~6h / full-day job. 360 realistic, audit's 35 min nonsense. LEAVE; owner to confirm base size/material.

name: Shed assembly
reasoning: Build a shed from a flat-pack kit on an existing base. ~4h for a standard shed (two-person jobs faster wall-by-wall). 240 realistic; audit's 35 min nonsense. LEAVE; owner to confirm shed size.

name: Lay turf & topsoil
reasoning: Prep bed, spread topsoil, lay/roll turf. Physically heavy, area-sold. Small ~5h, medium ~7h, large ~full day are realistic. Audit's 35 min nonsense. LEAVE; owner to confirm areas behind tiers.

name: Fit a rotary or washing line
reasoning: Fit a rotary dryer/line, set socket in concrete. ~1-1.25h (excl. cure). 120 long; 75 honest.

name: Lay weed membrane
reasoning: Lay weed membrane + bark/stone over a bed. Area-dependent; clearing/levelling first adds time. 120 reasonable for a typical bed. LEAVE; owner to confirm typical area.

name: Weed treatment
reasoning: Spray herbicide over weeds/overgrowth. Application is quick once mixed. 90 long; 45 honest for the typical domestic spray.

name: Fit a baby gate
reasoning: Fit a stair/doorway safety gate. ~45 min honest. No change.

name: Fit bathroom accessories
reasoning: Fix soap dishes/roll holders/hooks securely. ~45 min for a small set. Honest. No change.

name: Fit or remove a cat flap
reasoning: Cut/fit a cat flap into a door or panel (glass is specialist/excluded). ~1-1.5h in timber/uPVC. 90 fair-but-slightly-long; 75 honest. Owner to confirm if glass cut-outs are in scope (those are much longer).

name: Fit door stops
reasoning: Fit door stops (min 4). ~5-10 min each. Already close to honest; trim slightly to 10/unit + 15 setup. Audit ratio 0.97 — basically fine.

name: External fixture fitting
reasoning: Fix outdoor signs/brackets/numbers/hose reels, weather-seal. ~45 min for a small fixture. Honest. No change.

name: Fill holes & cracks
reasoning: Fill holes/cracks, sand, leave paint-ready. Prototype patch_plaster ~60 min but a few filler holes is less. 60 slightly long for the common case; 45 honest (excludes drying between coats, which isn't on-site labour).

name: Fit fly screens
reasoning: Fit insect screens to windows. ~25-35 min each. 50/window padded; 30/unit + 15 setup honest.

name: Hang clocks, signs & hooks
reasoning: Fix small wall items securely. Prototype mount_fixture ~20 min total. 30/item long; 15/unit + 15 setup honest.

name: Hang a mirror
reasoning: Mount a mirror level, weight-rated fixings. Prototype hang_mirror ~30 min total. 50/mirror padded; 25/unit + 15 setup honest. Heavy mirrors lean to the higher end.

name: Hang pictures & frames
reasoning: Hang pictures/frames level. ~10-15 min each. 25/item slightly long; 15/unit + 15 setup honest.

name: Key safe fit
reasoning: Fix a key safe to masonry. ~45 min (drill, plug, bolt). 60 slightly long; 45 honest.

name: Handful of small jobs
reasoning: A visit to clear a list of small odd jobs — sold AS a time block (~2h). Here time IS the product, so 120 is intentional, not inflation. LEAVE; this is a deliberate labour-hour SKU.

name: Fit towel rail or holder
reasoning: Fix a towel rail/ring firmly. ~30-35 min. Honest. No change.

name: Gutter clearing
reasoning: Clear gutters + flush downpipes off a ladder. A standard semi ~1-1.5h; large/3-storey more. 120 fair for a big house, long for the median; 75 honest. Owner to confirm typical property size/access.

name: Gutter or downpipe repair
reasoning: Fix leaking joints/brackets or swap a section. ~1.5h typical. 120 fair-but-slightly-long; 90 honest. Owner to confirm — height/access drives this.

name: Kitchen cupboard door fix
reasoning: Refit/realign/replace a cupboard door so it closes square. ~30-45 min. 60 slightly long; 45 honest.

name: Drill unit for appliance
reasoning: Drill pipe/cable holes through kitchen units for an appliance install. ~45-60 min. 75 slightly long; 60 honest.

name: Kitchen unit fitting
reasoning: Fit kitchen units, level, secure, align doors. Prototype fit_kitchen_unit ~45 min + 20 setup PER unit. Small (1-2 units) ~1.5h, medium ~3h, large ~5h are realistic. LEAVE; owner to confirm unit counts behind the tiers.

name: Fit a worktop
reasoning: Measure, cut, scribe, fit and seal a laminate worktop run. ~3-4h for a typical L-shape (more for joints/cut-outs). 240 fair for a complex run, long for a simple one; 180 honest. Owner to confirm typical run/joints (solid/stone is specialist and longer).

name: Change a lock
reasoning: Change a euro cylinder/like-for-like lock, test. ~30-45 min. 60 slightly long; 45 honest.

name: Fit a cabinet or coded lock
reasoning: Fit a cabinet/gate/keypad lock. ~45 min. 75 long; 45 honest.

name: Fix a faulty lock
reasoning: Free a sticking/misaligned lock. ~45 min. Honest. No change.

name: Fit multiple locks
reasoning: Fit/upgrade several locks across doors. If ~3 locks at ~25-30 min each = ~90 min. 120 slightly long; 90 honest. Owner to confirm typical lock count behind this SKU.

name: Air-con clean & filter check
reasoning: Clean a split-unit, check filters. ~1h is honest. No change.

name: Deep clean (single room)
reasoning: Deep-clean one room/appliance. Time-sold cleaning labour. ~2-2.5h typical. 150 fair-but-slightly-long; 120 honest for a single room. Owner to confirm scope (kitchen/bathroom deep cleans run longer).

name: Oven & hood deep clean
reasoning: Deep-clean oven + extractor hood inside/out. ~1.5h typical (dip-tank kit speeds it). 120 slightly long; 90 honest.

name: Paving, path or slab work
reasoning: Lay/repair paving, paths, slabs — excavate, sub-base, lay, point. Physically heavy, area-sold. Small ~3h is arguably LIGHT; bumped Small/Medium UP (180/300) and kept Large at 480 (full day). One of the few where I'd lean LONGER, not shorter. Strong owner-call — sub-base depth drives everything.

name: Repointing & brickwork
reasoning: Rake out + repoint loose mortar joints. Slow, fiddly, area-dependent — a patch of repointing easily fills 2h+. 120 reasonable for a small area. LEAVE; owner to confirm typical area (large elevations are multi-hour/day).

name: Minor roof repair
reasoning: Small roof repair (tiles, vent, sealing) at height. Access/ladder/scaffold-tower setup eats time; the work itself is short. 120 reasonable incl. access. LEAVE; owner to confirm access method (tower/roof-ladder changes it a lot).

name: Site visit & assessment
reasoning: Scope work on site, write a plan/quote. On-site assessment is typically ~30-60 min (excl. travel, which dispatch handles separately). 90 long; 60 honest. Owner to confirm how long their surveys actually take.

name: Mould treat & repaint ceiling
reasoning: Treat mould, seal, repaint a ceiling. ~2h on-site (treatment + two coats, blocking primer). 120 honest. No change (audit ratio 0.88 — already fine).

name: Paint a ceiling
reasoning: Two coats emulsion on a ceiling. Prep + cut-in + two coats ~2h on-site (drying isn't labour). 150 slightly long; 120 honest.

name: Paint a door
reasoning: Prep + repaint a door incl. frame. Hands-on time ~1.5h (between-coat drying isn't on-site labour but a door usually needs the painter present across coats). 90 honest. No change.

name: Paint exterior render or facade
reasoning: Prep + masonry-paint a rendered facade. Whole-facade external work is a genuine full day+ (prep, access, two coats). 480 realistic; audit's 137 nonsense. LEAVE; owner to confirm whether 480 covers one elevation or whole house, and access method.

name: Paint a fence or shed
reasoning: Treat/paint a fence or shed. Area-sold. A typical run of fence or one shed ~3h; long boundaries more. 240 fair for a big run, long for the median; 180 honest. Owner to confirm typical area (fence length).

name: Paint a front door
reasoning: Rub down + repaint a front door in exterior finish. Prep + coats with the door present ~2h. 120 honest. No change (audit ratio 0.88).

name: Paint metalwork or pipework
reasoning: Prep + paint radiators/pipes/railings/garage door. ~2h hands-on for a typical item. 120 honest. No change.

name: Repaint a room
reasoning: Repaint a room: prep, fill, two coats walls (+ ceiling/woodwork by scope). Prototype paint_room = 'least certain', ~210 min walls-only + setup. Small ~2.5h, medium ~half day (incl. ceiling/woodwork), large full-ish day are realistic. LEAVE; this is the prime owner-call/actuals candidate per the prototype.

name: Repaint window sills
reasoning: Scrape, sand, treat mould, repaint sills. A couple of sills ~1.5h hands-on. 120 slightly long; 90 honest.

name: Touch-up & patch paint
reasoning: Sand, fill, blend small patches. ~1h. Honest. No change (audit ratio 0.44 — already low).

name: Paint a single wall
reasoning: Prep + two coats on one wall. Prototype paint_wall ~75 min + setup. 120 slightly long; 90 honest.

name: Paint woodwork & skirting
reasoning: Rub down + repaint skirting/architraves/woodwork per room. Prototype paint_woodwork ~90 min + setup, but a full room's woodwork with the tradesperson present across coats ~2.5h. 180 slightly long; 150 honest. (Audit didn't even flag this — confirms it's near-fine.)

name: Stain-block & repaint
reasoning: Treat stain, block with primer, repaint. ~1-1.5h hands-on. 90 marginally long; 75 honest.

name: Hang wallpaper
reasoning: Hang wallpaper with matched seams. A feature wall ~2-3h; a whole room ~half-to-full day (pattern repeat, prep). 240 reasonable for a room. LEAVE; owner to confirm whether this is per-wall or per-room and pattern complexity.

name: Strip wallpaper
reasoning: Score, steam, strip, fill, sand ready to decorate. Messy and slow but Small at 4h is a touch long for a feature wall; trimmed to 180/300/420. Stubborn multi-layer/painted-over paper pushes it back up — owner-call on typical condition.

name: Plaster patch or skim
reasoning: Patch/fill/skim to paint-ready. Skimming is a skilled, continuous job: a small patch ~2-2.5h, a wall ~half day, a room of walls ~full day (plus you must stay through coats). Tiers realistic; audit's 55 nonsense. LEAVE; owner to confirm areas behind tiers.

name: Sand & make good walls
reasoning: Sand back, fill, prep walls smooth for paint. Dusty, area-dependent. A room ~2-3h. 180 fair for a whole room, long for a wall; 120 honest. Owner to confirm typical area.

name: Plasterboard a wall or ceiling
reasoning: Fit plasterboard to a wall/ceiling, tape ready for skim. Battening/noggins + boarding a wall ~half day; a ceiling overhead is slower/2-person. 300 fair for a ceiling, long for a small wall; 240 honest. Owner-call — overhead vs wall matters.

name: Stopcock or valve swap
reasoning: Replace a seized stopcock/isolation valve (drain down, swap, test). ~1h. 75 slightly long; 60 honest.

name: Sink or shower drain unblock
reasoning: Clear a slow/blocked sink/basin/shower drain. ~45-50 min. Honest. No change.

reasoning: Trace a leak, fix where possible, advise. ~1-1.25h is honest diagnostic+fix time. No change.

reasoning: Bleed + balance a system. ~45 min for a typical house. Honest. No change.

reasoning: Fit a bar mixer + riser rail onto existing feeds, test. ~1.5h on existing pipework. 120 slightly long; 90 honest.

reasoning: Swap a hose/head. ~15-30 min. Honest (already low). No change.

reasoning: Swap a basin/bath tap on existing supply, test. ~45-60 min (basin taps in tight spaces can run long). 50 honest. No change.

reasoning: Fit a new seat. ~20-30 min. Honest (already low). No change.

name: Fit a splashback
reasoning: Fit a splashback (tile/glass/acrylic), cut, seal. Acrylic/glass ~1.5h; tiled ~2-3h. 150 fair for tiled, long for acrylic; 120 honest. Owner to confirm dominant material.

name: Tiling install
reasoning: Tile walls/floor: prep, set out, fix, grout, seal. Prototype retile ~30 setup + 35/m². Small splashback/area ~2h, medium ~half day, large ~full day are realistic. LEAVE; owner to confirm m² behind tiers (and note grouting often is a second visit/day).

name: Remove old tiles
reasoning: Strip old tiles + prep surface. Hacking tiles off is hard graft and area-dependent; a small area ~1.5h, a full wall more. 150 fair for a wall, long for a splashback; 120 honest. Owner to confirm typical area.

name: Security camera fit
reasoning: Mount + set up a wireless camera. ~1h (positioning, app). 75 slightly long; 60 honest.

name: Smart doorbell fit
reasoning: Fit + set up a video doorbell. ~30-45 min (wiring/app pairing). 60 slightly long; 45 honest.

name: Mount a soundbar
reasoning: Mount a soundbar under a TV, level, tidy cable. ~45 min. Honest. No change.

name: TV wall mount (brick/solid)
reasoning: Mount a TV on solid/brick wall, run cables, test. Prototype tv_mount ~70 min, +30 if cables concealed. 90 fair; 75 honest for surface-cabled. Lean to 90 if concealment is standard — owner could keep 90.

name: Conceal TV cables
reasoning: Hide TV cables in trunking or behind wall. ~1h (more if chasing plaster). 60 honest for trunking. No change.

name: TV wall mount (plasterboard)
reasoning: Mount a TV on plasterboard (locate noggins/use fixings), cables, test. ~1-1.5h. 90 fair-but-slightly-long; 75 honest.

name: Dismantle & remove a shed
reasoning: Dismantle a shed + clear the waste (incl. tip run, which IS on-site/loading labour). ~3-4h for an average shed. 240 fair for a big/concrete-felted shed, long for a small one; 180 honest. Owner to confirm typical shed size + whether tip-run time sits here.

name: Waste & rubbish removal
reasoning: Load, take away, dispose (per volume). Prototype clearance ~90 min/load incl. tip run. Small ~1.5h, medium ~2h, large ~3h (incl. loading + tip) are realistic. LEAVE; owner to confirm whether tip-run time is captured here vs travel buffer.

name: Remove an appliance
reasoning: Disconnect + remove a bulky appliance. ~45-60 min on-site (disposal/tip handled in WASTE or buffer). 60 honest. No change.

name: Remove old furniture
reasoning: Remove + dispose of unwanted furniture. ~1h on-site loading. 75 slightly long; 60 honest.
